entries.name: attendance-reconcile
entries.purpose: Nightly 03:00 UTC (tenant-local resolved at job time): sweep completed sessions from the last 25 hours, create AbsenceRecord for no-shows.

entries.name: attendance-cleanup-orphan-checkins
entries.purpose: Nightly 04:00 UTC: verify atomicity invariants — every finding is P1. Runs AFTER the reconcile job so new orphan states from the previous night are surfaced.

entries.name: attendance-notify-absences-cascade
entries.purpose: Daily 08:00 UTC: cascade notifications for absences recorded in the previous 24h (batch dispatch — deduplicates per athlete per day).

entries.name: attendance-weekly-digest
entries.purpose: Weekly Monday 09:00 UTC: aggregate weekly attendance report per branch. Requires attendance_analytics entitlement.

entries.name: attendance-purge-fraud-signals
entries.purpose: Weekly Sunday 05:00 UTC: null-out device_fingerprint_hash / ip_address / gps_lat / gps_lng on attendance records more than 1 year past session.ends_at. Attendance rows themselves survive; only the fraud signals are redacted.

entries.name: attendance-purge-completed
entries.purpose: Weekly Sunday 06:00 UTC: hard-purge attendance / absence / late-arrival rows past retention (7y attendance / 3y absence / co-terminous late-arrival). 10y attendance retention for tenants with attendance_extended_retention entitlement.
